scripts.title: RSI Reversal Strategy
scripts.source:
//@version=5
strategy("RSI Reversal Strategy", overlay=true)
len = input.int(14, "RSI Length")
oversold = input.int(30, "Oversold Level")
overbought = input.int(70, "Overbought Level")
r = ta.rsi(close, len)
longSignal = ta.crossover(r, oversold)
shortSignal = ta.crossunder(r, overbought)
if longSignal
    strategy.entry("Long", strategy.long)
if shortSignal
    strategy.entry("Short", strategy.short)
if ta.crossunder(r, 50)
    strategy.close("Long")
plot(r, "RSI", color=color.purple)
mustMap: inputs contains len=14, oversold=30, overbought=70
entry direction long with when = cross{dir:above, a: rsi{period:input len, source:price close}, b: input oversold (or num 30)}
entry direction short with when = cross{dir:below, a: rsi{...}, b: input overbought}
exit{when: cross{dir:below, a: rsi{period:len}, b: num 50}} (strategy.close maps to exit)
plot of rsi with label RSI, pane sub (overlay=true script but rsi is oscillator; pane price is acceptable if converter keys off overlay)
immutable bindings r/longSignal/shortSignal inlined at use sites

scripts.title: EMA Cross SL TP Strategy
scripts.source:
//@version=5
strategy("EMA Cross SL/TP", overlay=true)
fastLen = input.int(9, "Fast EMA")
slowLen = input.int(21, "Slow EMA")
slPerc = input.float(2.0, "Stop Loss %")
tpPerc = input.float(4.0, "Take Profit %")
fastMa = ta.ema(close, fastLen)
slowMa = ta.ema(close, slowLen)
longCond = ta.crossover(fastMa, slowMa)
if longCond
    strategy.entry("L", strategy.long)
strategy.exit("XL", "L", stop=close * (1 - slPerc / 100), limit=close * (1 + tpPerc / 100))
plot(fastMa, "Fast EMA", color=color.orange)
plot(slowMa, "Slow EMA", color=color.blue)
mustMap: inputs contains fastLen=9, slowLen=21, slPerc=2.0, tpPerc=4.0
entry direction long, when = cross{dir:above, a: ma{kind:ema, period:fastLen, source:close}, b: ma{kind:ema, period:slowLen, source:close}}
stop stmt: mode percent value slPerc (recognized pattern close*(1-p/100)) OR mode price with arith expr arith{*, price close, arith{-, num 1, arith{/, input slPerc, num 100}}}
target stmt: mode percent value tpPerc OR mode price with the mirrored arith expr
two plot stmts (Fast EMA, Slow EMA) pane price

scripts.title: MACD Panel Indicator
scripts.source:
//@version=5
indicator("MACD Panel", overlay=false)
fastLen = input.int(12, "Fast Length")
slowLen = input.int(26, "Slow Length")
sigLen = input.int(9, "Signal Length")
[macdLine, signalLine, histLine] = ta.macd(close, fastLen, slowLen, sigLen)
plot(macdLine, "MACD", color=color.blue)
plot(signalLine, "Signal", color=color.orange)
plot(histLine, "Histogram", color=color.gray, style=plot.style_histogram)
mustMap: inputs contains fastLen=12, slowLen=26, sigLen=9
tuple destructuring: macdLine binds to macd{line:macd, fast:fastLen, slow:slowLen, signal:sigLen, source:close}
signalLine binds to macd{line:signal, ...}; histLine binds to macd{line:histogram, ...}
three plot stmts, all pane sub (overlay=false)
plot labels MACD, Signal, Histogram with mapped colors
mayWarn: plot style_histogram rendering style dropped (only value/label/color/pane kept)

scripts.title: Bollinger Bands Overlay
scripts.source:
//@version=5
indicator("BB Bands", overlay=true)
length = input.int(20, "BB Length")
mult = input.float(2.0, "StdDev Mult")
src = input.source(close, "Source")
[middle, upper, lower] = ta.bb(src, length, mult)
pMid = plot(middle, "Basis", color=color.orange)
pUp = plot(upper, "Upper", color=color.blue)
pLo = plot(lower, "Lower", color=color.blue)
fill(pUp, pLo, color=color.new(color.blue, 90))
mustMap: inputs contains length=20, mult=2.0
tuple destructuring of ta.bb: middle -> bollinger{band:middle, period:length, dev:mult, source:close}, upper -> bollinger{band:upper,...}, lower -> bollinger{band:lower,...}
three plot stmts pane price (overlay=true)
plot ids (pMid/pUp/pLo) as assignment targets do not break conversion
mayWarn: color.new(color.blue, 90) transparency reduced to base color
input.source treated as fixed close source (source-type input not representable as numeric input)

scripts.title: Pullback Counter Strategy
scripts.source:
//@version=5
strategy("Pullback Counter", overlay=true)
maLen = input.int(50, "MA Length")
needed = input.int(3, "Down Bars Needed")
var int downCount = 0
ma = ta.sma(close, maLen)
if close < close[1]
    downCount += 1
else
    downCount := 0
enterLong = downCount >= needed and close > ma and strategy.position_size == 0
if enterLong
    strategy.entry("Long", strategy.long)
if close < ma
    strategy.close("Long")
mustMap: init contains setvar downCount=0 (var int declaration)
if{cond: compare{<, price close, price{close, offset:1}}, then:[setvar downCount = arith{+, var downCount, num 1}], else:[setvar downCount = num 0]} — += desugars to setvar with arith +
entry when includes compare{>=, var downCount, input needed}
strategy.position_size == 0 maps to compare{==, ctx{position_dir}, num 0} (flat-position gate)
entry when also includes compare{>, price close, ma{kind:sma, period:maLen, source:close}} joined by logic and
exit{when: compare{<, price close, ma sma}}
mayWarn: position_size magnitude approximated by position_dir ctx (sign-only)

scripts.title: RSI Momentum History Indicator
scripts.source:
//@version=5
indicator("RSI Momentum", overlay=false)
len = input.int(14, "RSI Length")
r = ta.rsi(close, len)
mom = r - r[1]
priceChg = close - close[1]
plot(mom, "RSI Change", color=color.purple)
plot(priceChg, "Price Change", color=color.gray)
plot(0, "Zero", color=color.silver)
mustMap: inputs contains len=14
r[1] on a bound name maps to shift{src: rsi{period:len, source:close}, offset:1}
mom inlined as arith{-, rsi{...}, shift{rsi{...},1}} at plot site
close[1] maps to price{field:close, offset:1} (or shift over price close)
priceChg plot value = arith{-, price close, price{close, offset:1}}
three plots pane sub, including constant plot num{0}

scripts.title: EMA Cross Alerts Indicator
scripts.source:
//@version=5
indicator("EMA Cross Alerts", overlay=true)
fastLen = input.int(8, "Fast EMA")
slowLen = input.int(34, "Slow EMA")
fastE = ta.ema(close, fastLen)
slowE = ta.ema(close, slowLen)
bull = ta.crossover(fastE, slowE)
bear = ta.crossunder(fastE, slowE)
plot(fastE, "Fast EMA", color=color.green)
plot(slowE, "Slow EMA", color=color.red)
plotshape(bull, title="Buy", style=shape.triangleup, location=location.belowbar, color=color.green, text="BUY")
plotshape(bear, title="Sell", style=shape.triangledown, location=location.abovebar, color=color.red, text="SELL")
alertcondition(bull, title="Bull Cross", message="Fast EMA crossed above slow EMA")
alertcondition(bear, title="Bear Cross", message="Fast EMA crossed below slow EMA")
mustMap: inputs contains fastLen=8, slowLen=34
alert{message:'Fast EMA crossed above slow EMA', when: cross{dir:above, a: ma ema fastLen, b: ma ema slowLen}}
alert{message:'Fast EMA crossed below slow EMA', when: cross{dir:below,...}}
plotshape(bull, triangleup, belowbar) maps to marker{dir:up/long, label:'Buy' (or 'BUY'), when: cross above}
plotshape(bear, triangledown, abovebar) maps to marker{dir:down/short, when: cross below}
two plot stmts pane price
mayWarn: plotshape style/location/text cosmetic details collapsed into marker dir+label

scripts.title: Donchian Breakout Strategy
scripts.source:
//@version=5
strategy("Donchian Breakout", overlay=true)
chanLen = input.int(20, "Channel Length")
upperBand = ta.highest(chanLen)[1]
lowerBand = ta.lowest(chanLen)[1]
if close > upperBand
    strategy.entry("Long", strategy.long)
if close < lowerBand
    strategy.entry("Short", strategy.short)
plot(upperBand, "Upper", color=color.teal)
plot(lowerBand, "Lower", color=color.teal)
mustMap: inputs contains chanLen=20
ta.highest(chanLen) with omitted source maps to extreme{kind:highest, period:chanLen, source:price high} (default source is high)
ta.lowest(chanLen) maps to extreme{kind:lowest, period:chanLen, source:price low}
[1] on the bound band maps to shift{src: extreme{...}, offset:1}
entry long when compare{>, price close, shift{extreme highest,1}}
entry short when compare{<, price close, shift{extreme lowest,1}}
two plots pane price of the shifted extremes

scripts.title: Range Expansion Math Strategy
scripts.source:
//@version=5
strategy("Range Expansion", overlay=true)
atrLen = input.int(14, "ATR Length")
mult = input.float(1.5, "Range Multiplier")
atrVal = ta.atr(atrLen)
barRange = math.abs(close - open)
threshold = math.max(atrVal * mult, math.pow(atrVal, 1.1))
excess = barRange % atrVal
if barRange > threshold and close > open
    strategy.entry("Long", strategy.long)
if barRange > threshold and close < open
    strategy.entry("Short", strategy.short)
plot(excess, "Range mod ATR", color=color.gray)
mustMap: inputs contains atrLen=14, mult=1.5
math.abs maps to unary{op:abs, a: arith{-, price close, price open}}
math.max maps to minmax{op:max, a: arith{*, atr{period:atrLen}, input mult}, b: pow expr}
math.pow(atrVal, 1.1) maps to arith{op:^, a: atr{atrLen}, b: num 1.1}
% maps to arith{op:%, a: unary abs expr, b: atr}
entry long when logic{and, compare{>, barRange expr, threshold expr}, compare{>, close, open}}; entry short mirrored
plot of the % expression

scripts.title: Kitchen Sink Mixed Support
scripts.source:
//@version=5
indicator("Mixed Kitchen Sink", overlay=true)
len = input.int(20, "MA Length")
maVal = ta.sma(close, len)
htfClose = request.security(syminfo.tickerid, "D", close)
vw = ta.vwap
bias = close > maVal ? 1 : -1
total = 0.0
for i = 0 to 4
    total := total + close[i]
avg5 = total / 5
plot(maVal, "SMA", color=color.blue)
plot(htfClose, "Daily Close", color=color.orange)
plot(vw, "VWAP", color=color.purple)
plot(bias, "Bias")
plot(avg5, "Manual 5-bar Avg")
mustMap: inputs contains len=20
plot of ma{kind:sma, period:len, source:close} label SMA pane price converts successfully
conversion completes (does not abort) despite unsupported constructs
unsupported plots either skipped with warning or given placeholder values, but the SMA plot is preserved
mayWarn: request.security unsupported — higher-timeframe data not representable
ta.vwap unsupported (no vwap node in IR)
numeric ternary (close > maVal ? 1 : -1) unsupported unless converter desugars to if/setvar
for loop with close[i] dynamic index unsupported (repeat{count} cannot express varying offset) — may drop or approximate as agg{fn:sum, period:5}/5

scripts.title: Old School RSI (v4)
scripts.source:
//@version=4
study("Old School RSI", overlay=false)
len = input(14, "len")
src = close
r = rsi(src, len)
buy = cross(r, 30)
sell = cross(r, 70)
hline(70, "Overbought")
hline(30, "Oversold")
plot(r, "RSI", color=color.purple)
plotshape(buy, title="RSI 30 cross", style=shape.circle, location=location.bottom, color=color.green)
mustMap: v4 handled gracefully: no crash, StrategyIR produced or clean version diagnostic
if converted: inputs contains len=14 (legacy input(defval, title) form)
study() treated as indicator declaration
rsi(src, len) without ta. namespace maps to rsi{period:len, source:close}
cross(r, 30) maps to cross{dir:any, a: rsi, b: num 30}
plot of rsi pane sub; plotshape(buy) maps to marker with when = cross any
mayWarn: hline() unsupported — warn and skip (or approximate as constant plot)
legacy unnamespaced builtins (rsi, cross) resolved via v4 compatibility aliases

scripts.title: Stoch WPR Combo Strategy
scripts.source:
//@version=5
strategy("Stoch WPR Combo", overlay=false)
kLen = input.int(14, "Stoch Length")
smoothK = input.int(3, "Smooth K")
wprLen = input.int(14, "WPR Length")
k = ta.sma(ta.stoch(close, high, low, kLen), smoothK)
d = ta.sma(k, 3)
w = ta.wpr(wprLen)
longCond = ta.crossover(k, d) and w < -80
shortCond = ta.crossunder(k, d) and w > -20
if longCond
    strategy.entry("Long", strategy.long)
if shortCond
    strategy.entry("Short", strategy.short)
plot(k, "%K", color=color.blue)
plot(d, "%D", color=color.orange)
mustMap: inputs contains kLen=14, smoothK=3, wprLen=14
k recognized as stoch{line:k, period:kLen, smooth:smoothK} (sma-over-ta.stoch pattern) OR as ma{sma, period:smoothK} wrapping a raw stoch — either is acceptable but the stoch semantics must survive
d maps to stoch{line:d,...} or ma{sma, period:3, source:k expr}
ta.wpr(wprLen) maps to wpr{period:wprLen}
entry long when logic{and, cross{dir:above, a:k, b:d}, compare{<, wpr, num -80}} with -80 as num or unary{neg, num 80}
entry short when logic{and, cross{dir:below, a:k, b:d}, compare{>, wpr, num -20}}
two plots (%K, %D) pane sub (overlay=false)
mayWarn: ta.stoch(close, high, low, kLen) explicit source args collapsed to canonical stoch node
